name: 符号与意义
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 文化与信仰 / Culture & Beliefs / Culture & Beliefs
curriculum_points: Students will be able to recognize that symbols, signs, and images communicate meaning and identify examples from their own environment (K-2).
Students will be able to analyze how symbols are used in different cultural contexts and art forms to convey messages, beliefs, and values (3-5).

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
